suggestions.title: Acceptance criterion #4 is not verifiable from current tests
suggestions.recommendation: Add an integration/manual validation path that calls TRAPI and validates Mattingly/Winfield/Henderson are present.

suggestions.title: Schema assertion is ambiguous for jersey_number typing
suggestions.recommendation: Assert explicit schema keys and integer requirement instead of exact literal with "integer" token.

suggestions.title: Live TRAPI test should be explicit opt-in to avoid CI flakiness
suggestions.recommendation: Gate the manual TRAPI test behind an explicit opt-in environment variable.

suggestions.title: Manual test should validate schema keys and jersey_number type
suggestions.recommendation: Assert key set and field types for each player entry.

suggestions.title: Manual TRAPI test should use checked-in prompt artifact
suggestions.recommendation: Load and send system/user message content from prompts/get_1985_yankees.txt.

suggestions.title: Add response shape assertions for clearer failures
suggestions.recommendation: Assert TRAPI response structure before indexing nested keys.
